svg.title: ragpicker architecture with Streamlit or React frontend
svg.desc: Architecture showing a Streamlit or React frontend calling a FastAPI backend which triggers a LangGraph RAG pipeline backed by Redis, Qdrant, Ollama, and Postgres

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build a RAG chat UI in Streamlit?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a RAG chat UI in React?')
sendPrompt('How do I expose a LangGraph pipeline via FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('How does the Redis cache layer work in RAG?')
sendPrompt('Which Ollama embedding model should I use for RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does Qdrant vector similarity search work?')
sendPrompt('Which Ollama model works best for RAG generation?')
sendPrompt('What TTL should I set for the Redis RAG cache?')
sendPrompt('How does LangGraph Postgres checkpointing work?')
